releaseNotes:
• Global module search with Ctrl+K — instantly filter tweaks, games, and categories
• Dashboard layout overhaul — max-width rail, aligned 4-column telemetry grid, uniform card heights
• Smooth anti-aliased memory/CPU sparklines and consistent rounded progress bars
• Optimization toggles, technical detail accordions, and refined quick-action chips
• Category module grid with identical vertical rhythm and hover micro-interactions
